hero.heading: YOUR WORKFLOW. YOUR MODULES. YOUR OPS.
hero.subtitle: We work with you to build custom modules that fit the way you actually run your business. Not a template. Not a workaround. Software shaped around your operation, built on the OPS foundation.
hero.founderLine: I scaled a deck and railing business before writing OPS. SPEC starts the same way: field problems first, software second.
process.step1.title: Pick your package, lock your spot
process.step1.desc: Choose Setup, Build, or Enterprise. Pay the 25% P1 deposit to reserve your build slot. We take on a limited number of SPEC clients to protect quality.
process.step2.title: Tell us how you work
process.step2.desc: Complete a detailed intake interview covering your workflows, pain points, and the way your crew actually operates day-to-day. We study the results before we ever meet.
process.step3.title: We meet. We build.
process.step3.desc: Discovery session with your analysis already done. Then we build your custom modules directly into OPS. You see progress in real time.
process.step4.title: Go live. Keep evolving.
process.step4.desc: Launch your custom OPS with a support window included. After that, an optional retainer keeps your modules updated and evolving as your business grows.
board.unavailableNote: Live board offline. Static intake windows shown.
packages.spec01.name: SETUP
packages.spec01.tagline: We configure OPS around your workflow

packages.spec01.examples.desc: Custom pipeline stages (Lead to Inspection to Quote to Signed to Complete), roof-type fields on projects, material tracking tags
Service call vs renovation pipeline split, urgency-based task sorting, permit number and inspection date fields
Seasonal vs maintenance client categories, recurring job templates, zone-based crew assignment fields

packages.spec01.ongoing: +15% OPS subscription estimate. $250/mo optional maintenance retainer after support window.
packages.spec02.name: BUILD
packages.spec02.tagline: A custom module built for your trade
packages.spec02.features: 1 custom module — new features, new views, new logic

packages.spec02.examples.desc: Deck measurement tool — draw deck shapes, calculate board feet and materials, generate material lists linked to project estimates
Equipment lifecycle tracker — log units by serial number, track warranty dates, auto-schedule maintenance, link service history to client records
Permit and inspection module — track permits per job, auto-reminders for inspection dates, photo documentation with inspector sign-off

packages.spec02.ongoing: +30% OPS subscription estimate. $450/mo optional maintenance retainer after support window.
packages.spec03.name: ENTERPRISE
packages.spec03.tagline: Your entire operation, custom-built on OPS
packages.spec03.features: Deep integrations with your existing tools
Data migration from your current systems

packages.spec03.examples.desc: Subtrade management, multi-trade scheduling, bid comparison tool, QuickBooks integration, full migration from Buildertrend
Tenant portal, work order routing, vendor dispatch, unit-level maintenance history, lease integration, migration from AppFolio
Trade-specific modules for each division, cross-division resource sharing, unified client view, division-level P&L reporting

packages.spec03.ongoing: +50% OPS subscription estimate. $750/mo optional maintenance retainer after support window.
packages.depositLedger: RESERVES YOUR SLOT · CREDITED TO YOUR BUILD
packages.milestones.label: 4 MILESTONES
packages.milestonesNote: Each milestone is 25% of the package. P1 reserves the slot. P2, P3, and P4 are invoiced as work clears review.
packages.subscriptionNote: Final subscription impact is locked during discovery.
questionnaire.title: Four questions. One straight answer.
questionnaire.q1.question: How much do you want to change?
questionnaire.q1.configure: Configure OPS around how we already work
questionnaire.q1.one_module: Build one custom module for my trade
questionnaire.q1.rebuild: Rebuild my whole operation on OPS
questionnaire.q2.question: When do you need it live?
questionnaire.q3.question: How big is your crew?
questionnaire.q4.question: What's your budget for the build?
questionnaire.rationale.spec01: Setup fits — we configure OPS around your workflow, live in days.
questionnaire.rationale.spec02: Build fits — one custom module for your trade, live in a couple weeks.
questionnaire.rationale.spec03: Enterprise fits — your whole operation, custom-built on OPS.
included.every: Discovery sessions to understand your workflow
Custom modules on your live OPS platform
Support window (30, 60, or 90 days by tier)
included.ongoing: OPS subscription: $90-190/mo (may increase if custom modules add infrastructure cost)
Additional feature requests: quoted as new projects
guarantees.col1.title: 30 days to walk away
guarantees.col1.body: If the build is not the right fit inside the Guarantee Window, you can request the Guarantee Refund under the SPEC terms.
guarantees.col2.title: Pay as work clears review
guarantees.col2.body: Four milestones. P1 reserves the slot. P2, P3, and P4 are invoiced only after the previous stage is reviewed.
guarantees.col3.title: Scope before build
guarantees.col3.body: The Scope Document locks what gets built, what counts as accepted, and what becomes a change order.

faq.items.question: What happens after I pay the deposit?
faq.items.answer: You get access to the intake interview within 24 hours. Complete it at your pace — it covers your workflows, pain points, and how your crew operates. We review the results and schedule your discovery session.

faq.items.question: How long does a custom build take?
faq.items.answer: Setup packages: 1-2 weeks. Build packages: 2-3 weeks. Enterprise: 4-6 weeks. We build fast because the founder does the work directly, with modern tooling.

faq.items.question: What is the intake interview?
faq.items.answer: A guided interview about your business — your workflows, your team structure, your pain points, how jobs flow from lead to completion. Takes about 30-45 minutes. We use the results to show up to your discovery session already knowing your operation.

faq.items.question: What if I need changes after the support window?
faq.items.answer: The maintenance retainer covers bug fixes, minor updates, and keeping your custom modules compatible with OPS platform updates. Bigger feature requests are quoted as new projects.

faq.items.question: Do I need a separate OPS subscription?
faq.items.answer: Yes. SPEC is a build service — your OPS subscription is your ongoing access to the platform. It may be higher than standard if your custom modules require additional infrastructure.

faq.items.question: Can I upgrade my package later?
faq.items.answer: Yes. Start with Setup to configure OPS for your workflow. If you want a custom module built later, the Build package fee applies (minus what you already paid for Setup). Same for Enterprise.

faq.items.question: What if I am not sure which package I need?
faq.items.answer: Start with Setup. It is the lowest commitment and we will tell you honestly during discovery if your needs require Build or Enterprise. No pressure, no upsell games.

faq.items.question: Is there a refund policy on the deposit?
faq.items.answer: If we have not started work, the P1 deposit is fully refundable. Once discovery begins, each milestone covers work already completed. P2, P3, and P4 are invoiced as the build clears review.

bottomCta.heading: READY TO BUILD SOMETHING THAT FITS?
bottomCta.subtitle: Pick your package. Pay the P1 deposit. We handle the rest.
confirmation.heading: You're in.
confirmation.subtitle: Deposit received. Your intake link is on the way — that's the next thing that matters.
